issue.title: Old migration note should be updated after deprecation change
issue.body: The existing memory says the v1 migration guidance is still current.

comments.body: Maintainer clarification: the old migration note is deprecated and the new guidance applies only after the next release.

prs.title: Update migration guidance
prs.body: This merged PR revises the deprecation guidance and links issue #42.

releases.name: v2.9.0
releases.body: Release note: migration guidance from #42 and #77 is fixed in this release.

docs.text: Changed: migration guidance is now updated for the deprecation path.
